summary: This is an extremely brief holiday post from December 25, 2004, consisting of nothing more than a link to Paul Auster's 'Auggie Wren's Christmas Story' and a note that it inspired the movie Smoke. At only 14 words, it's essentially a Christmas Day link share rather than a substantive blog post. There is no argument, analysis, or original commentary offered.
key_points: Joel shares a link to Paul Auster's 'Auggie Wren's Christmas Story' as a Christmas Day post
He notes the short story was the inspiration for the 1995 film Smoke
The post contains no original commentary or analysis, serving purely as a holiday recommendation
key_insight: This is a minimal holiday link post with no substantive content to analyze.
